issue_summary: Microsoft 365 is showing an active Exchange Online service degradation. Some users may be intermittently unable to access their mailboxes through Outlook mobile apps and the new Outlook for Mac. Separate Microsoft 365 admin/sign-in issues were also reported and appear to have been restored, which raises confidence that this is part of a broader current M365 disruption window.
impact: Intermittent mailbox access failures for affected users; likely helpdesk ticket volume and login/mail triage for MSP-served tenants using Exchange Online clients.
response_1: Check whether affected users are on Outlook mobile or the new Outlook for Mac, and shift urgent users to Outlook on the web or alternate access paths where possible.
response_2: Pause local client remediation unless tenant-specific evidence exists; monitor Microsoft 365 service health and prepare client-facing advisory updates if ticket volume rises.
